query: skill pack import dedup skill search modal scroll

results.title: Support .agents skill imports and modal overflow fix
results.content: Allowed explicit and discovered skill imports under .agents/skills by whitelisting .agents as a supported hidden import directory. Also centered the skills import dialog, constrained modal height, and enabled internal scroll plus break-word rendering for recent jobs and progress text. Verified with uv run pytest -q tests/integration/test_tools.py -k 'agents_skill_directory or skill_import_git' and bun run check.

results.title: Changelog updated for v0.5.5 dynamic skill retrieval
results.content: Filled CHANGELOG.md v0.5.5 with dynamic skill retrieval CLI additions, active skill state in .coder/active-skills.json, raw/json skill output, agent/workflow alignment, and fixes for stale skill context and markdown flattening.

results.title: Phase 5 dashboard skill import UX slice
results.content: Extended the dashboard skill registry to support Git-based skill import submission, excerpt_kind editing, and source metadata visibility. Updated src/dashboard/src/lib/api/admin.ts, src/dashboard/src/components/SkillRegistryShell.astro, and src/dashboard/src/scripts/skills-page.ts, then synced Phase 5 progress docs to mark P5-T07A partial. Verified with bun run check (0 errors, 1 existing hint in Card.astro) and bun run build in src/dashboard.

results.title: Content template modals extracted to components
results.content: Moved create/edit modal and delete confirm modal out of ContentTemplateList into dedicated components under _sections/_components, keeping all behavior and props flow unchanged. Updated imports and wiring in ContentTemplateList. Files: src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/content-templates/_sections/_components/ContentTemplateEditorModal.tsx, src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/content-templates/_sections/_components/ContentTemplateDeleteModal.tsx, src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/content-templates/_sections/ContentTemplateList.tsx

results.title: SelectKit multi and combobox defaults now show active arrow-key item
results.content: Updated src/shared/components/ui/select-kit-core.tsx so the default item classes for MultiSelect and Combobox add data-[active=true]:bg-accent. Arrow-key navigation was already updating activeValue in SelectPrimitive, but these default render paths did not visually reflect the active item, which made RHF fields look stuck while navigating with ArrowUp/ArrowDown. Verified with eslint and tsc --noEmit.
